heroSubtitle: Got questions? We've got answers. Find everything you need to know about shopping with us.
processingDesc: We prepare your order within 1-2 business days. Personalized items may take an extra 24 hours.
freeShippingDesc: Orders over $75 qualify for free standard shipping. No code needed — applied automatically at checkout.
internationalDesc: We ship globally! International rates are calculated at checkout based on weight. Duties and taxes are the recipient's responsibility.
returnsDesc: Changed your mind? No problem. You have 30 days after receiving your item to request a return. Items must be in original condition, with tags and packaging.
step1Desc: Enter your order number and email in our portal.
step2Desc: We'll email you a pre-paid shipping label immediately.
step3Desc: Receive refund to original payment within 5 days.
stillHaveQuestionsDesc: Our support team is ready to help with anything you need.
